calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. specially appearing for Plaintiff: Creditors Adjustment Bureau., A California Corporation; Witness Kevin Smith was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant Health Case Matrix, Inc. as follows:
Principal: $25,137.24; Pre-Judgment Interest: 11,454.32; Attorney Fees: $2,850.00 and Costs: $298.30 for a total judgment of $39,739.86.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Continued To Jul-01-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2005 Continued To May-20-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
